name: Clinical Management
description: Full clinical management system — manage patient records, schedule appointments, assign doctors, and track treatments with medical history and billing integration.
author: AENEWS

capabilities.name: searchPatients
capabilities.description: Search for patients by name, ID, or phone number

capabilities.name: createAppointment
capabilities.description: Schedule a new patient appointment with a doctor

capabilities.name: getDoctor
capabilities.description: Get doctor profile with schedule and specialties

capabilities.name: updateTreatment
capabilities.description: Update treatment plan, medication, or notes

capabilities.name: deleteAppointment
capabilities.description: Cancel or delete a patient appointment

capabilities.name: getPatient
capabilities.description: Get patient profile with medical history and treatments

capabilities.name: searchAppointments
capabilities.description: Search appointments by date, doctor, or status

permissions.name: Read
permissions.description: Read clinic data including patients, appointments, and treatments

permissions.name: Write
permissions.description: Create/Update patients, appointments, doctors, and treatments

permissions.name: Delete
permissions.description: Delete patient records, appointments, and treatment plans

permissions.name: Admin
permissions.description: Full clinic administration including scheduling and billing policies
